headline: ServiceNow Partnerships Deepen AI Workflow Role Across Supply Chain And HR
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) is being adopted as an AI-driven enterprise platform by new ecosystem partners and customers. KODIS has launched ONYX by KODIS on ServiceNow for supply chain orchestration. BigPanda has introduced an elite Build Partner integration with ServiceNow focused on incident management. Coforge is rolling out AI-powered HR Service Delivery globally on the ServiceNow platform. For investors tracking enterprise software, ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) sits at the center of a broad shift...
